query: SELECT id, title, LENGTH(content) as content_length FROM safetyTopics ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 378BqZUfvZWHcSK.root --database dNJxctHZxj6wCg3jq4j4kh --execute SELECT id, title, LENGTH(content) as content_length FROM safetyTopics ORDER BY id LIMIT 10;
